checks.name: structured-runtime-boundary
checks.detail: Installer runtime failures now stay out of CLI usage, including early installer throws covered by executeHappyTG structured-failure tests plus install runtime tests for missing-token and Windows shim cases.

checks.name: repo-retry-fallback
checks.detail: Repo sync retries transient primary failures 5 times, surfaces progress, switches to the configured fallback source automatically, and reports repoSource/fallbackUsed in result JSON and text summary.

checks.name: windows-shim-resilience
checks.detail: Windows-style npm/pnpm shims are normalized through the command layer and ENOENT cases return actionable structured installer failures instead of crashing.

checks.name: resume-persistence
checks.detail: Installer draft state persists Telegram/background/repo choices across reruns, and rerun logic now ignores an unavailable saved clone mode and resumes with update/default selection.

checks.name: tui-paste
checks.detail: Telegram setup reducer accepts multi-character paste chunks, strips bracketed-paste markers, and keeps editing/navigation behavior stable.

checks.name: release-metadata-031
checks.detail: Workspace package versions, changelog, README release link, and docs/releases/0.3.1.md are aligned; release validation passed for 0.3.1.

checks.name: repo-lint
checks.detail: pnpm lint passed across the workspace.

checks.name: repo-typecheck
checks.detail: pnpm typecheck passed across the workspace.

checks.name: repo-test
checks.detail: pnpm test passed across the workspace.

checks.name: repo-doctor
checks.detail: pnpm happytg doctor completed with expected workspace warnings because this checkout still has no .env / TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN configured.

checks.name: repo-verify
checks.detail: pnpm happytg verify completed with the same expected local-environment warnings only; no installer regression was reported.
